# Swift FocusEngine Pro

> AI agent skill for correct focus management code on Apple platforms (tvOS, iOS/iPadOS, watchOS, visionOS, macOS).

## What It Is

Swift FocusEngine Pro is a free, open-source agent skill that helps AI coding assistants write correct focus management code for Apple platforms. It covers SwiftUI, UIKit, and RealityKit — targeting the mistakes LLMs actually make with Apple's focus engine.

Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Gemini CLI, and any tool supporting the Agent Skills format (agentskills.io).

## Who It's For

- tvOS developers building apps where every interaction depends on the focus engine
- iOS/iPadOS developers adding keyboard, game controller, or Stage Manager support
- visionOS developers navigating gaze vs hover vs focus in spatial computing
- watchOS developers working with Digital Crown and sequential focus

## Install

```
npx skills add https://github.com/mhaviv/Swift-FocusEngine-Agent-Skill --skill swift-focusengine-pro -g -y
```

## What It Covers

3,200+ lines across 13 reference files: anti-patterns, SwiftUI focus (tvOS), UIKit focus (tvOS), iOS/iPadOS focus, watchOS focus, visionOS focus, RealityKit focus, focus styling, focus restoration, layout patterns, async focus coordination, accessibility focus, and debugging tools.

## Key Links

- Repository: https://github.com/mhaviv/Swift-FocusEngine-Agent-Skill
- Skill definition: swift-focusengine-pro/SKILL.md
- Reference files: swift-focusengine-pro/references/
- Install instructions: README.md#installing
- Agent Skills format: https://agentskills.io
- Listed in: https://github.com/twostraws/Swift-Agent-Skills
